_raw: {"job_title":"Machine Learning Engineer","company":"Waymo","summary":"Optimize FLOPs utilization during model training and inference through architecture and hardware co-development, Enhance model inference efficiency across onboard and offboard simulation platforms, Analyze and improve real-time inference performance of complex model architectures with multiple components, Develop methods for efficient learning from large-scale real-world data, Collaborate with downstream teams to integrate optimized models into the Waymo Driver system, Conduct research to address real-world challenges and contribute to ongoing innovation","skills":["Python programming","PyTorch or JAX","Model architecture","Hardware optimization","Sparse representations","Model training","Analysis","Deployment at scale","Problem-solving skills","Collaborative team environment","C++ programming","CVPR","ICCV","ECCV","ICLR","ICML","ICRA","IROS","RSS","NeurIPS","AAAI","IJCV","PAMI"],"experience":[{"role":"Machine Learning Engineer","company":"Waymo","location":"","dates":"Mon YYYY - Mon YYYY","details":["Optimized FLOPs utilization during model training and inference, reducing computational overhead by 30%","Led a team to develop efficient real-time inference pipelines for complex models","Automated model deployment on onboard and offboard platforms, resulting in 99.95% uptime","Reduced MTTR from 45m to 9m by implementing automated monitoring and alerting systems","Scaled platform to handle 10x traffic with 100% scalability"]}},"education":["MS, State University of New York at Buffalo, YYYY"]}
